title: Services Canadians often compare when moving to the Netherlands
intro: Banking, housing, insurance, shipping, and mobile are common categories to line up before and after arrival.

items.reason: International transfers while you coordinate CAD and EUR cash flow.
Digital Dutch banking often used soon after BSN and address.
Short and mid-term listings while you search for a long-term rental.
Dutch SIM options after you land.
Compare Dutch basic health insurance once you are resident.
